# Fyper — Complete Reference for LLMs

> Type-safe Cypher query builder for F#. Computation expressions, parameterized by default, multi-backend (Neo4j, Apache AGE).

## Installation

```bash
dotnet add package Fyper              # Core query builder
dotnet add package Fyper.Parser       # Cypher string parser
dotnet add package Fyper.Neo4j        # Neo4j Bolt driver
dotnet add package Fyper.Age          # Apache AGE (PostgreSQL) driver
```

## Schema Definition

Plain F# records. No attributes needed by default.

```fsharp
type Person = { Name: string; Age: int }
type Movie = { Title: string; Released: int }
type ActedIn = { Roles: string list }
```

Conventions:
- Type name = node label (Person -> :Person)
- PascalCase field = camelCase property (FirstName -> firstName)
- Relationship type = UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (ActedIn -> ACTED_IN)

Optional: [<Label "CUSTOM">] and [<CypherName "custom_name">] attributes.

## Query Examples

### Basic Query
```fsharp
let query = cypher {
    for p in node<Person> do
    where (p.Age > 30)
    select p
}
// MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.age > $p0 RETURN p
```

### Relationship
```fsharp
let query = cypher {
    for p in node<Person> do
    for m in node<Movie> do
    matchRel (p -- edge<ActedIn> --> m)
    where (p.Age > 30)
    select (p.Name, m.Title)
}
// MATCH (p:Person) MATCH (m:Movie) MATCH (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m)
// WHERE p.age > $p0 RETURN p.name, m.title
```

### OPTIONAL MATCH
```fsharp
for m in optionalNode<Movie> do  // OPTIONAL MATCH (m:Movie)
```

### Variable-Length Paths
```fsharp
matchPath (p -- edge<Knows> --> q) (Between(1, 5))  // *1..5
matchPath (p -- edge<Knows> --> q) AnyLength          // *
matchPath (p -- edge<Knows> --> q) (Exactly 3)        // *3
```

### CREATE
```fsharp
create { Name = "Alice"; Age = 30 }              // CREATE (:Person {name: $p0, age: $p1})
createRel (p -- edge<ActedIn> --> m)              // CREATE (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m)
```

### SET
```fsharp
set (fun p -> { p with Age = p.Age + 1 })        // SET p.age = (p.age + $p0)
set (fun p -> { p with Age = 51 })                // SET p.age = $p0
```

### DELETE
```fsharp
delete p                                           // DELETE p
detachDelete p                                     // DETACH DELETE p
```

### MERGE
```fsharp
merge { Name = "Tom"; Age = 0 }
onMatch (fun p -> { p with Age = 50 })
onCreate (fun p -> { p with Age = 25 })
// MERGE (:Person {...}) ON MATCH SET p.age = $p0 ON CREATE SET p.age = $p1
```

### Aggregation
```fsharp
select (count())                    // count(*)
select (sum(p.Age))                 // sum(p.age)
select (avg(p.Age))                 // avg(p.age)
select (collect(p.Name))            // collect(p.name)
select (cypherMin(p.Age))           // min(p.age)
select (cypherMax(p.Age))           // max(p.age)
selectDistinct p.Name               // RETURN DISTINCT p.name
```

### CASE, UNWIND, WITH
```fsharp
select (caseWhen (p.Age > 18) p.Name "minor")    // CASE WHEN ... THEN ... ELSE ... END
unwind names "name"                                // UNWIND $p0 AS name
withClause p                                       // WITH p
```

## Execution

```fsharp
// Inspect without executing
let cypherString, params = query |> Cypher.toCypher

// Execute read query
let! results = query |> Cypher.executeAsync driver

// Execute write query
let! count = mutation |> Cypher.executeWriteAsync driver

// Transaction
let! result = Cypher.inTransaction driver (fun tx -> task {
    let! _ = q1 |> Cypher.executeWriteAsync tx
    let! _ = q2 |> Cypher.executeWriteAsync tx
    return 2
})

// Raw Cypher
let! records = Cypher.rawAsync driver "MATCH (n) RETURN count(n)" Map.empty
```

## Neo4j Driver Setup
```fsharp
open Fyper.Neo4j
let driver = new Neo4jDriver(
    Neo4j.Driver.GraphDatabase.Driver("bolt://localhost:7687",
        Neo4j.Driver.AuthTokens.Basic("neo4j", "password")))
```

## AGE Driver Setup
```fsharp
open Fyper.Age
open Npgsql
let ds = NpgsqlDataSource.Create("Host=localhost;Database=mydb;Username=user;Password=pass")
let driver = new AgeDriver(ds, graphName = "my_graph")
```

## Parser
```fsharp
open Fyper.Parser
let parsed = CypherParser.parse "MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.age > 30 RETURN p"
let compiled = Fyper.CypherCompiler.compile parsed
```

## Backend Capabilities

Neo4j: all features supported.
AGE: MATCH, WHERE, RETURN, CREATE, DELETE, SET, ORDER BY, SKIP, LIMIT, variable-length paths. NOT supported: OPTIONAL MATCH, MERGE, UNWIND, CASE, CALL.

Unsupported features rejected at query construction time with FyperUnsupportedFeatureException.

## Exceptions

FyperConnectionException: connection/auth failure
FyperQueryException: Cypher syntax error (includes query + params)
FyperMappingException: result type mismatch
FyperUnsupportedFeatureException: backend doesn't support feature
